creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
Thanks for looking into this in more detail on your side.  Of all
FreeBSD users and several ports relying on lang/gcc, this is the
only report of this kind I have received the last month or two,
after fixing the original case.

I am not sure what may be going on, but there must be something
very specific (and possible incorrect) on your end.

>  WITH_SSP_PORTS=yes
>  
>  Could the last option be the problem?

Possibly, though I would not consider it very likely.

Do you have some unusual CFLAGS or -I options set?

Gerald
